author: Wzyss
install_msg: Thank you for installing Clear. Use `[p]help clear` for commands. Requires Manage Messages (or mod) permission.
name: Clear
short: Clear/purge messages in a channel (by count, after message, between messages, or by user).
description: Allows mods and admins to manage messages in a channel: clear a number of messages, clear all messages after a given message, clear messages between two messages, or clear messages from a specific user. Supports both slash and prefix commands.
